message:
test(fcp-crypto): add RFC test vectors and additional crypto tests

- Added RFC 5869 Test Cases 2 and 3 for HKDF-SHA256
- Added FCP2-specific key derivation tests (session, MAC, objectId)
- Fixed X25519 tests to use correct base point multiplication semantics
- Added iterated DH test for X25519

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
